data.title: AscendEX will list KIKICat (KIKI)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch KIKICat (KIKI) at 20:00 on March 20, open KIKI/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.

data.title: User Loses $304,000 Due to Mistaken Address Transfer
data.description: According to Foresight News, Scam Sniffer has reported that a user has lost approximately $304,000 in assets due to transferring funds to an incorrect address. The incident highlights the risks associated with digital transactions and the importance of verifying addresses before completing transfers.

data.title: Amos and Lumma crypto malware is being distributed via Reddit posts
data.description:
Lumma and AMOS crypto-stealing malware has recently been distributed via Reddit posts. These posts target Windows and Mac users in the crypto space.  Such posts use various tactics to trick the user into downloading infected software. However, one lure is becoming particularly common – a cracked version of TradingView.  These scammers have recently been lurking […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/amos-and-lumma-crypto-malware-reddit/

data.title: Federal Reserve Projects Moderate Rate Cuts by 2025
data.description:
Fed predicts rate cuts in 2025 amid cautious economic outlook, impacting financial markets globally.
source: https://coincu.com/327503-fed-2025-rate-cuts-projection

data.title: Trump Media execs launch SPAC to raise $179M; eyeing US-based crypto, data security firms
data.description:
The SPAC seeks to raise $179 million to fund its acquisition of a company in the crypto, blockchain or dual-use technology sectors.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347207/trump-media-execs-launch-spac-to-raise-179m-eyeing-us-based-crypto-data-security-firms?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: SOL Investor Faces Significant Loss Amid Market Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa has reported that the address 9YteR...Yj1WT appears to have sold off 30,000 SOL tokens, initially purchased two weeks ago at $145 each, totaling approximately $3.9 million. This transaction is expected to result in a loss of $456,000. Over the past month, SOL has experienced a nearly 25% decline in value.

data.title: Cardano Founder Slams Centralization Claims as ADA Outperforms Bitcoin
data.description:
Cardano (ADA) founder Charles Hoskinson has dismissed fresh allegations that the blockchain is controlled by a few entities. Critics argue that its governance model undermines decentralization, contrasting it with Bitcoin (BTC). Meanwhile, ADA’s market performance has drawn attention, outpacing BTC and Ethereum (ETH) over the past six months.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/19/cardano-founder-slams-centralization-claims-as-ada-outperforms-bitcoin/

data.title: Arthur Hayes Predicts Bitcoin Bull Market Amid Fed Policy Debate
data.description:
Arthur Hayes suggests changes in Fed policy could drive Bitcoin to $77,000. Current market dynamics analyzed.
source: https://coincu.com/327491-arthur-hayes-bitcoin-bull-market

data.title: BitMart Launches Banana For Scale (BANANAS31)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Banana For Scale (BANANAS31) at 13:00 (Eastern Time) on March 20. The BANANAS31/USDT trading pair will be launched. The concept of "Banana for Scale" first became popular on Reddit in 2012, when users humorously took photos of bananas next to objects to convey their size.
